{{Quote|Flame on!|A clone blaze trooper|<ref name="Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (video game)">[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' video game]]</ref>}}
The '''clone blaze trooper''' was the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] frontline close-combat [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] support unit and a type of advanced [[Clone jet trooper/Legends|jet trooper]]. It had very heavy [[Armor/Legends|armor]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:CloneBlazeTrooper-ROTSGG.png|thumb|left|200px|A [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II]] clone blaze [[Clone trooper/Legends|trooper]]]]

Heavily armored and jet-propelled, the blaze troopers were hulking figures in their heavy combat armor, standing at 2.37 meters (7.9 feet) tall, which appeared similar to that later worn by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper]]s.

They were tasked with "blazing" through enemy lines and clearing accumulated battlefield debris out of the way of advancing infantry, using their wrist-embedded [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrowers]] and physical strength.

Their preferred method of attacking Jedi and most ground enemies was to rush them using their backpacks to increase their speed, and either backhanding the target while flying past or putting a target in a bear hug before slamming them into the ground where they would use their flamethrowers on their opponent.

==History==
These troopers served on battlefronts such as [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]], [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]], [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]], and [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. These clone troopers carried flamethrowers that they used to disperse crowds of enemies, and their hands could tear through [[B2-series super battle droid]]s.

A number of blaze troopers were deployed in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] during [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|Operation: Knightfall]] and in its [[Infiltration of the Jedi Temple/Legends|aftermath]] where they fought against [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]].

==Equipment==
Blaze troopers were equipped almost uniformly with heavy [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]] and dual wrist-mounted [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrowers]]. Their armor was extremely thick of reinforced [[duraplast]] plating and having a powerful [[exoskeleton]], a necessity due to their unique weaponry.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:CloneBlazeSuperTrooper-CWA.jpg|thumb|right|A clone "super trooper"]]
Players of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'' video game]] can purchase a set of armor that strongly resembles clone blaze trooper armor. However, this armor is dubbed "Super Trooper."
